title: QIKSION 2 Pack Light Blue Plastic Tablecloth Disposable Circle Table Covers Sky Blue Table Cloths for Parties Bridal Shower Birthday Wedding, Fits 6 Foot Round Tables (84 Inch)
features: What You Will Get: The package includes 2 pcs light blue tablecloth (84 Inch), nice combination for you to use in daily life or important occasions enhancing the atmosphere for your event.
Classic Design: Our light blue tablecloth adds a charming touch to any event or occasion - perfect for use as a light blue tablecloth or any light blue-themed event décor.

Convenient and Disposable: Don't worry about spills and stains. Made of high-quality plastic material, this blue plastic tablecloth is durable and convenient for busy events. Plus, it is disposable - no need for post-party clean-up!
Suitable Size: Our light blue tablecloth measures 84 inches, and fits seating for 8-10 people. Can be used for indoor and outdoor events.

Affordable Solution: Our light blue tablecloth is a stylish and practical solution for any event, whether a picnic or wedding. And, at an affordable price, it's the perfect addition to your party supplies.
description: Product description 2 Pack Light Blue Plastic Tablecloth Disposable Circle Table Covers Sky Blue Table Cloths for Parties Bridal Shower Birthday Wedding, Fits 6 Foot Round Tables (84 Inch) Safety Warning Do not use near open flames or high heat. Avoid contact with hot liquids or foods to prevent melting or warping. Not machine washable or dryable. Dispose of responsibly after use.
